reviews.review_description: Healium is expensive, but it's in a league of its own  - in this case, I feel like you do get what you pay for. Stunning and immersive visuals, excellent ambient sound and music, an ideal level of customizability (enough that you can get rid of anything that annoys, but not so much that it is overwhelming), and a broad selection with diverse set ups make me keep coming back for more. Everything works correctly (which isn't always the case in so many I've tried) (I will say that I don't use the biofeedback features though, so I can't attest to how it integrates with wearables or the app). The voices chosen for the narrations are great (I like the Aussie accent especially LOL).  And the effects of a session feel comparable to having had a good "sit" meditation IRL. This one is hands down my favorite meditation app.

reviews.review_title: Beautiful app, but way to expensive!
reviews.review_description:
First of all: the app is indeed wonderful - but unfortunately also very expensive.
As there are now a lot of very good relaxation/meditation apps for the MetaQuest 3 (the best of which is still ‘Tripp’, which at EUR 89 per year is also much more affordable than the Healium app), this app is simply outrageously expensive at a price of EUR 309 per year.

But that's not all.
Despite the high price, I wanted to give the app a chance and take out the 14-day trial subscription on offer. But this was apparently immediately turned into a real subscription and EUR 309 was directly debited from my account.
There has been no response from the healium support to my email yesterday.
Then I had to find out that the app was not billed via the Meta-Store, but via Google Play.
Fortunately, I was able to cancel the subscription I had mistakenly taken out via Google Play.

Nevertheless, this is not trustworthy, especially with such a high price for an app. 
If I didn't always cancel all apps immediately because I'm not a fan of auto-renewals, I would probably have realised too late what had gone wrong here and taken out an expensive subscription that I didn't even want.

So, even though it's a very nice app: watch out!

developer_response.body: Hi Katharina! This is great feedback for us. We love to learn from our customers what they want. Very sorry our Google Play product charged you! We've alerted our product team to get that fixed for you asap. Thank you for sharing your sentiments about our price as we are constantly evaluating it and learning. There are a lot of great relaxation apps out there. They all do different things. Isn't that great! If you're not using Healium with your smartwatch or EEG meditation headband or haven't tried our Heal-U neuromeditation curriculum or data analytics, we'd love to hop on a call with one of our concierges to demonstrate its value. Healium allows you to power the experiences with bio or neurofeedback so you can SEE your feelings. The environments are reactive to you so you know....am I doing this right? What we offer may not be for everyone as meditation in this mental wellness crisis is not one size fits all.  We so appreciate you taking the time to share your experience. We're listening, Katharina, and it will help us do better. Thank you! Sending you positive vibes.

reviews.review_description: They used to offer some free ones on here but no longer since they decided to become greedy.  They have now changed it to a subscription where you have to pay monthly.

developer_response.body: Hi Jennifer. Healium has a free trial. You can activate it through the Healium mobile app. Feel free to email us at hello@tryhealium.com if you have issues accessing it or have difficulty with the price. Thanks for checking us out!

reviews.review_description:
The developers REALLY need to re-think their business model.  Healium requires a $30 MONTHLY subscription fee which is just insane.  My lifetime subscription to Tripp was only around $34 (well worth it).  

The free content on offer within Healium is nice.  Healium has done an above-average job in preparing meditation experiences that I find effective and well done.  Not everyone responds to experiences in the same way so YMMV, but the developers are on the right track with the (free) experiences I've sampled.

Unfortunately, that insane subscription price is just a non-starter unless you're an enterprise customer.  I'd be remiss if I didn't mention that Healium is developed with an option to use a $179 "Brainlink" EEG headband which provides additional input to your experience.  Although that would be a neat feature, it isn't one that most people are going to invest in.  So who is Healium for?  It's NOT for your average Quest user since almost no one is going to pay $30 a month to unlock new experiences.  I do recommend downloading Healium and trying the free content as much of it is good.  The developers are really missing an opportunity with how they've chosen to (try to) monetize this product and it's a shame.  Pricing it so astronomically high effectively excludes 99.9% of the Quest audience (and the other .1% probably aren't going to pay $30 a month anyway).

developer_response.body:
Thanks for checking out Healium! We appreciate your feedback and are always looking to improve. We hear you on the price!  We took your feedback back to our team and recently lowered the price to $10.99 a month. Healium is unlike any other app because it's powered by your body's electricity. Our library for pro subscribers includes a base of 30+ experiences. We add a new experience every 60 days and have the unique ability to track brainwave data that is compiled via an *optional EEG headband called a Brainlink. This unique feature allows you to change XR assets with your mind....and see your flow states personified as a Jaguar, etc. and change over time. If you'd like to trial a pro subscription, just email us at hello@tryhealium.com . You don't need just one meditation app. You need all of them. Keep that feedback coming. Sending you positive vibes! 

Healium Customer Success

reviews.review_title: Unable to buy or sign up for free trial
reviews.review_description: The link to buy doesn't go to purchase page, so I'm unable to buy

developer_response.body: Hi Serendipity22. We just updated the app to make it easier. Start by downloading our mobile IOS or Android companion app or go to our website. You'll find the signup page there as well. Thanks for test driving Healium!

reviews.review_description:
This is as good or better quality than anything I’ve downloaded from the Store. It was easy enough to download from the app lab just not sure why it’s there. It’s very polished, looks great, functions great. 

Why review a free app? Because Meta/Quest has made it that we can never ever ever delete anything from our library ever.  So maybe some people are like me and are a bit discerning about which free apps they’ll try. No need to worry with this one, it’s a keeper. It’s a number of incredibly immersive, brief, guided meditation experiences. If you’ve had trouble making meditation a habit, or are just getting a bit lazy with it, this app is fantastic. You’re instantly in the zone.

I also bought the Brainlink device out of curiosity so paid for the subscription version of the app at about $US10/month to use with that. It’s pretty fun and has applications for improving mental fitness through the visual neurofeedback. It’s not as sensitive as I expected but that’s just as likely me needing more practice with it. So if mind control via the Brainlink can take over from the controllers or hand tracking in future, I’ve got a bit of training to do ;)

I experienced some confusion re logging in to the paid version of the app but the developers were easy to communicate with and very helpful.

developer_response.body:
I love how you describe Healium. Very insightful. We appreciate the feedback, Bette. We're working to make it easier to understand how to subscribe to our app. Thank you. Robyn our customer support may have talked to you. If not email hello@tryhealium.com . We're always here to explain anything as not only is VR new but using EEG headbands or smart watches with our mobile app to train...can also take some time to get used to. You can use Healium in two ways: 
 1. Without a wearable feedback interaction where the experiences automatically play. 2.  With a wearable feedback interaction where you get feedback like the screen turning red or black or the firefly going up or down.  If the firefly moves up, that's good meaning your feelings of focused calm are increasing.  Think of that horizontal line as a high jump bar where it's your goal to get over the bar. Thanks for trying it!

reviews.review_description: Healium has been extremely effective for me and has been one of my favorite VR apps to date, if you haven't tried it yet I suggest giving it a chance at least once!

Unable to buy a subscription or brainlink via the website

finally had to get the app on google play and subscribe via google play

even so still cannot get the website purchase page to function using multiple different browsers on different devices

developer_response.body: Sorry Dawolfshowl.....we had a website bug.  It's been fixed. Thanks for letting us know. We're working to make it easier to understand how to subscribe. Thank you again for sharing your feedback with us!

reviews.review_description:
Firstly, I would like to say I have struggled to be able to find peace in my life, and I absolutely hate having to try to learn how to meditate. I have tried different techniques to control my own anxiety, to no avail. Healium helps to immersive in environments that bring back such fond childhood memories of my family in the snow that take me right back to those times and allow me to really calm down. They also have so many different landscapes that use in videos, even though some of them aren't for me(I AM AFRAID OF HEIGHTS, and really don't enjoy the waterfall one, but I have friends who have tried it and love ascending through the clouds..)

I would 100% recommend this to anyone who wants to relax, or calm down from the comfort of their own living room!
I came from tryhealium.com that offers a monthly suscription. Is healium free or not?

developer_response.body: Sorry we confused you. Healium is free with a two-week trial that you can get via our website or on our IOS or Android app by searching HEALIUM in the app store.  Or.... on the login screen on your Oculus, click "continue without logging in" to sample our content.
